Container.Name: PMDA
Container.Overview: PMDA matches music folders, isolates duplicates and incomplete releases, publishes a fast PostgreSQL-backed library, and provides playback, recommendations, and export workflows.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the PMDA web UI.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Persistent PMDA data: PostgreSQL, Redis state, settings, auth state, logs, and generated cache.

Config.Name: Music Root
Config.Description: Parent music share. Configure the exact Standard and Incoming source folders later in PMDA Settings.

Config.Name: Review Root
Config.Description: Root folder used for duplicate and incomplete review targets.

Config.Name: Enable PMDA Auth
Config.Description: Enable PMDA accounts and session-based access control.

Config.Name: Trust Proxy Headers
Config.Description: Enable when PMDA is placed behind Cloudflare Tunnel or another reverse proxy.

Config.Name: Secure Session Cookies
Config.Description: Set to true when PMDA is served over HTTPS.

Config.Name: Allow Public Bootstrap
Config.Description: Leave false for normal installs. Only enable temporarily if first-user setup must happen from outside your LAN.
